calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Assistant Districk Attorney, for petitioner and moving party: People of The State of California

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE:
Pamela Underwood, Esq., for petitioner and moving party: People of The State of California

NO OTHER APPEARANCE Stated. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents.
Compliance within 30 days of notice of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
